question: Amherst's draft Recreation Master Plan proposes a new splash pad at Dickey Park. Do you support this investment?
description: The Town's first Recreation Master Plan in over a decade is open for public feedback through the fall. A splash pad is one of several proposed capital projects.

options.text: Yes, it's a great addition for families
Support it, but only with outside funding

question: Should the Victoria Street boardwalk extension include interpretive signage on local Mi'kmaq and Acadian history?
description: The next phase of the marsh boardwalk is set to begin construction this fall. Council is considering interpretive panels along the new stretch.

options.text: Yes, it adds real educational value
Keep it simple, skip the signage
Yes, but partner with local historians first
